mapper.select:
SELECT a.id AS appointmentId, a.code AS appointmentCode, p.id AS patientId, pu.name AS patientName, d.id AS doctorId, du.name AS doctorName, s.name AS specialization, a.appointment_date AS appointmentDate, a.start_time AS startTime, a.end_time AS endTime, a.status AS status, d.consultation_fee AS consultationFee FROM appointments a JOIN patients p ON p.id = a.patient_id JOIN users pu ON pu.id = p.user_id JOIN doctors d ON d.id = a.doctor_id JOIN users du ON du.id = d.user_id LEFT JOIN specializations s ON s.id = d.specialization_id WHERE a.appointment_date BETWEEN #{startDate} AND #{endDate}
ORDER BY a.appointment_date ASC, a.start_time ASC

SELECT pay.id AS paymentId, a.id AS appointmentId, a.code AS appointmentCode, p.id AS patientId, pu.name AS patientName, d.id AS doctorId, du.name AS doctorName, pay.amount AS amount, pay.status AS paymentStatus, pay.payment_method AS paymentMethod, pay.created_at AS createdAt FROM payments pay JOIN appointments a ON a.id = pay.appointment_id JOIN patients p ON p.id = pay.patient_id JOIN users pu ON pu.id = p.user_id JOIN doctors d ON d.id = a.doctor_id JOIN users du ON du.id = d.user_id WHERE pay.created_at BETWEEN #{startDateTime} AND #{endDateTime}
ORDER BY pay.created_at DESC

SELECT p.id AS patientId, pu.name AS patientName, COALESCE(SUM(pay.amount), 0) AS totalRevenue, COUNT(pay.id) AS paymentCount, COALESCE(AVG(pay.amount), 0) AS averageRevenue FROM payments pay JOIN appointments a ON a.id = pay.appointment_id JOIN patients p ON p.id = pay.patient_id JOIN users pu ON pu.id = p.user_id WHERE pay.status = 'COMPLETED' AND pay.created_at BETWEEN #{startDateTime} AND #{endDateTime}
GROUP BY p.id, pu.name ORDER BY totalRevenue DESC, pu.name ASC

SELECT d.id AS doctorId, du.name AS doctorName, COALESCE(SUM(pay.amount), 0) AS totalRevenue, COUNT(pay.id) AS paymentCount, COALESCE(AVG(pay.amount), 0) AS averageRevenue FROM payments pay JOIN appointments a ON a.id = pay.appointment_id JOIN doctors d ON d.id = a.doctor_id JOIN users du ON du.id = d.user_id WHERE pay.status = 'COMPLETED' AND pay.created_at BETWEEN #{startDateTime} AND #{endDateTime}
GROUP BY d.id, du.name ORDER BY totalRevenue DESC, du.name ASC
